name: Validate Pods Order
description: Validates a PODS order across leg sequence, serviceability, and container availability. Fetch order -> prepare leg lines (sort by Sequence, map ItemCode->ServiceCode) -> evaluate Leg Sequences decision table -> foreach leg line call Serviceability -> filter IDEL lines needing container check -> foreach call ContainerAvailability -> return aggregated result. This is a structural skeleton; edit field values for the order under test, but do NOT delete activities or change the foreach wiring.

activities.name: Prepare Leg Lines (filter + sort + map service codes)
Check ContainerAvailability for one IDEL line
